prompt: We saw a 40% spike in EC2 costs yesterday. Investigate and explain who's responsible and what to do.
reference_response: Detected a 40% spike in EC2 costs on 2026-03-08. The spike was driven by team 'data-platform' (cost-centre CC-204) provisioning 24 p4d.24xlarge GPU instances in eu-west-2. Impact: +$18,432/day. Recommended action: contact the team owner, scale down to 4 instances overnight, and require approval for further provisioning. Escalation: cost-governance@example.com if no acknowledgement within 24 hours.
